title: Bennie
content:
{{Top}} {{Youmay|the [[canon]] [[medical droid]]|[[Behn-kihl-nahm]], a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity nicknamed "Bennie"|linebreak=1}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:Bennie-DarthMaulBlackWhiteAndRed2.png]] |name=Bennie |homeworld= |birth= |death=Between c. [[40 BBY]] and [[32 BBY]], a [[Unidentified moon (Moonbender Colony)|moon]]The events of [[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 2|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 2]], including Bennie's [[Death|destruction]] on a [[Unidentified moon (Moonbender Colony)|moon]], take place during [[Maul|Darth Maul's]] [[time]] as the [[Sith apprentice]] of [[Darth Sidious]], which ''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates to between around [[40 BBY]] and [[32 BBY]]. |creator= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |class=[[Medical droid]][[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 2|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 2]] |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender= |pronouns=He/him |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=[[Moonbender Colony]] }} {{Quote|Is she going to ''die?"
"''No, Bennie, just some ligament damage. ''[To the patient]'' Sorry. He could use a little reprogramming.|Bennie and Korvik, attending to a patient|}} '''Bennie''' was a [[medical droid]] that worked at the [[Moonbender Colony medcenter|medcenter]] of the [[Moonbender Colony]], assisting [[Doctor]] [[Korvik]], who felt that the [[droid]] needed some reprogramming. Between around [[40 BBY]] and [[32 BBY]], while the [[Sith apprentice]] [[Maul|Darth Maul]] [[Battle for Moonbender|attacked]] the colony to [[Death|kill]] the [[Remainders]] who ran Moonbender, Bennie assisted Korvik in tending to the wounded. After Maul defeated most of the Remainders, he entered the [[medcenter]] and fatally wounded Korvik. The doctor, however, had reprogrammed Bennie and ordered the medical droid to attack Maul, who destroyed him. {{Droid-stub}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Bennie}} *[[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 2|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 2]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Droids with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Droids with unspecified gender programming]] [[Category:Medical droids]]
